data.title: Morgan Stanley to Launch Bitcoin ETF as First Major U.S. Bank
data.description: Morgan Stanley is set to become the first major U.S. bank to issue and sponsor a Bitcoin ETF. According to ChainCatcher, Bloomberg announced this development during a live broadcast. The bank, which manages $10 trillion in assets, is taking a significant step in the cryptocurrency market by introducing this financial product.

data.title: Resolv: Over $77 million in USR has been redeemed in the past two days, accounting for more than 90% of the wallets on the Phase 1 whitelist.
data.description: Resolv Labs announced on the X platform that over the past two days, more than $77 million has been used to redeem whitelisted wallets that held USR before the attack, representing over 90% of that group. This marks significant progress in the first phase of the recovery effort. The redemption process for this group is currently underway, and subsequent phases will be implemented to cover the remaining users.

data.title: U.S. Senate Reaches Agreement to Cap Insulin Costs at $35, Semafor Reports
data.description: The U.S. Senate has reached an agreement to cap insulin costs at $35, according to Semafor. This move aims to make insulin more affordable for Americans who rely on the medication for managing diabetes. The decision comes amid ongoing discussions about healthcare costs and accessibility in the United States. The cap is expected to provide significant financial relief to patients who have been burdened by high insulin prices. This agreement marks a step forward in addressing the broader issue of rising healthcare expenses in the country.

data.title: JPMorgan Executive Warns of Financing Challenges for Carbon-Credit Projects
data.description: A JPMorgan executive has cautioned that developers involved in carbon-credit projects may face difficulties in securing bank financing for their initiatives. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the potential hurdles these developers might encounter in obtaining financial support from banks. The executive's warning underscores the challenges within the carbon-credit sector, which aims to reduce carbon emissions through various environmental projects. As the demand for sustainable solutions grows, the ability to finance these projects becomes crucial for their success. The executive's remarks reflect concerns about the financial viability and support for these initiatives, which are essential for achieving environmental goals.

data.title: Middle East Conflict Persists Amid U.S. Peace Efforts
data.description: The ongoing conflict in the Middle East shows no signs of abating, despite efforts by the U.S. to promote a peace plan. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the challenges faced in the region as tensions remain high. The U.S. government continues to advocate for diplomatic solutions, but the situation remains complex and volatile. Efforts to mediate have yet to yield significant progress, with both sides entrenched in their positions. The international community watches closely, hoping for a breakthrough that could lead to lasting peace.

data.title: Honda and Sony Cancel Joint Electric Vehicle Development Plans
data.description: Honda and Sony have decided to abandon their collaborative efforts to develop an electric vehicle. Bloomberg posted on X, revealing that the two companies have opted to discontinue their partnership in this venture. The decision marks a shift in strategy for both firms, as they reassess their positions in the rapidly evolving electric vehicle market. Honda and Sony initially announced their collaboration with the aim of combining automotive expertise with advanced technology to create a competitive electric vehicle. However, the companies have now chosen to pursue separate paths in the industry. This move reflects the challenges and complexities involved in the development of electric vehicles, as well as the dynamic nature of the market. Both Honda and Sony are expected to continue their individual efforts in the electric vehicle sector, leveraging their respective strengths and resources to navigate the competitive landscape.

data.title: STOCKS | Lanxess Shares Surge in Frankfurt Trading
data.description: Lanxess shares experienced a significant increase, rising by as much as 16% during Frankfurt trading. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting this as the steepest intraday advance for the company in nearly a year. The surge reflects positive investor sentiment and market dynamics influencing the chemical company's stock performance.

data.title: Gate will partner with the Red Bull F1 team to host a crossover exhibition in Victoria Harbour, Hong Kong.
data.description: Digital asset platform Gate announced a collaboration with the Red Bull Racing Formula 1 team to present the "Racing the Future" outdoor crossover exhibition at Victoria Harbour in Hong Kong from April 18th to 24th. A key highlight of Gate's 13th anniversary global celebration, the event is located in the landmark cultural and commercial space K11 MUSEA (Waterfront Promenade), covering 238 square meters and open to the public. Through racing engineering displays and immersive interactive experiences, the exhibition showcases the fusion of speed culture and technological elements. As an official sponsor of the Red Bull Racing Formula 1 team, Gate will be showcasing the team's 2026 new car and core equipment for the first time, introducing an immersive interactive experience zone that recreates the fusion of top-tier racing engineering and speed aesthetics. Racing suits, equipment, and gloves from champion drivers Max Verstappen and Isack Hadjar will also be on display, along with a giant helmet installation of Max Verstappen, strengthening the connection between fans and racing culture. Leveraging Formula 1, a top global sports IP, Gate is continuously strengthening its international brand influence and extending its digital asset platform to offline scenarios.

data.title: Bitget adds EWT and KWEB to its stock contracts, supporting leverage up to 25x.
data.description: According to the official announcement, to meet market demand for core Asian technology assets, Bitget's stock contract platform has launched two popular underlying assets: EWT (iShares MSCI Taiwan ETF) and KWEB (KraneShares CSI China Internet ETF). These contracts support leverage up to 25x. For more details, please refer to the Bitget official platform.

data.title: Resolv Exploit: Depositors Unaffected, Says kpk
data.description: kpk announced that depositors did not incur any losses following the recent $23 million exploit of Resolv. According to NS3.AI, the company has set the risk tolerance for the affected market to zero and has halted new allocations. Additionally, kpk confirmed that deposits into its Ethereum yield vault have resumed.

data.title: Aethir Announces Beta Launch of Aethir Claw Alpha, Physically Isolated AI Agent Hosting Platform
data.description: According to official news, Aethir has announced the launch of the Aethir Claw Alpha beta testing phase for its physically isolated AI agent hosting platform. Aethir Claw completely breaks away from the traditional hosting service provider's model of "renting and reselling third-party cloud services," directly utilizing Aethir's own distributed computing resources worth over $400 million. Through Aethir Claw, users not only obtain a completely isolated VPS environment but can also choose a "zero-vendor access" mode, ensuring absolute root-level data sovereignty over the AI ​​agent's API keys, dialogue records, and actions. The platform comes pre-installed with OpenClaw and will be deeply customized for business scenarios in later stages. It plans to integrate native cryptographic skills such as token tracking, on-chain alerts, and whale monitoring, and support cryptocurrency and fiat currency payments such as ATH and USDT. Furthermore, a "Model as a Service" (MaaS) layer will be launched in later stages, introducing open-source large-model inference based on Aethir GPUs, as well as image and video generation capabilities, fully entering the agentic AI application layer market. Aethir provides enterprise customers with automated management of large-scale server clusters for Kubernetes GPU clusters, spanning 94 countries and regions worldwide. 435,000 GPU containers provide ultra-low latency computing power access on more than 200 nodes, reducing overall computing power costs by 60% to 80%.

data.title: South Korea Ensures Stable LNG Supply Amid Potential Qatar Disruptions
data.description: South Korea's Blue House has announced that the country has secured a stable supply of non-Middle Eastern liquefied natural gas (LNG) through the end of the year. According to Jin10, this move comes as a precautionary measure against potential disruptions in LNG supply from Qatar. The South Korean government has prepared contingency plans and is ready to implement necessary measures to address any supply interruptions. This proactive approach aims to ensure energy security and stability in the country's LNG imports.

data.title: Binance Alpha has listed PRL (Perle), currently trading at 0.11 USDT.
data.description: PRL (Perle) has been listed on Binance Alpha and is currently trading at 0.11 USDT.

data.title: Guotai Junan UBS Fund to Gradually Close Online Settlement Channel
data.description:
Guotai Junan UBS Fund announced that since the launch of its 'Guotai Junan UBS Silver Fund' mini-program on February 26, significant progress has been made in settlements. According to Jin10, the majority of investors have completed settlements, with over 95% of those affected by amounts greater than 1,000 yuan having resolved their issues. The company stated that maintaining the online settlement channel requires substantial resources from all parties involved. As a result, they plan to gradually reduce and eventually close the online settlement channel based on the progress of settlements.

Guotai Junan UBS Fund emphasized that the announcement serves as a buffer for the eventual closure of the channel. They assured that communication channels will remain open for the minority of investors who have not yet settled, supporting them in resolving their claims through settlement, mediation, arbitration, or other legal means.

data.title: French Group Engages Banks for Potential Share Sale
data.description: A French company is currently in discussions with banks regarding a possible share sale. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the ongoing negotiations as the group explores financial strategies to enhance its market position. The talks are in preliminary stages, and no final decision has been made about the share sale. The company aims to leverage the expertise of financial institutions to assess the viability and timing of such a move. Further details about the potential transaction remain undisclosed as discussions continue.

data.title: Iran claims to have fired missiles at a US aircraft carrier, emphasizing its control over the Strait of Hormuz.
data.description: The Iranian military announced on the 25th local time that its forces had launched missiles to strike the US aircraft carrier USS Abraham Lincoln. No further details were disclosed. Iranian Navy Commander Illani stated that the Iranian Navy possesses "strong control and dominance" over the Strait of Hormuz and the Persian Gulf. He said that Iran is continuously monitoring the actions and movements of the USS Abraham Lincoln carrier strike group and indicated that the Iranian Navy would strike the group once it entered the range of its missile systems. (CCTV News)

data.title: HSBC Reports Surge in Demand for Estate Planning Services
data.description: HSBC Holdings has observed a significant increase in demand for estate planning and wealth transfer solutions, according to the company's insurance chief. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the growing interest among clients seeking to manage their financial legacies effectively. The surge in demand reflects a broader trend as individuals prioritize securing their assets and ensuring smooth transitions to future generations. HSBC's insurance division is responding to this trend by expanding its offerings to meet the evolving needs of its clientele. The company aims to provide comprehensive solutions that address the complexities of estate planning and wealth management, catering to a diverse range of financial goals and circumstances. This development underscores the importance of strategic financial planning in today's economic landscape, where individuals are increasingly focused on safeguarding their wealth for the future.

data.title: Iranian Navy: Once a US aircraft carrier enters missile range, it will become a target.
data.description: According to Iran's SNN news agency, Iranian Navy Commander Ilani stated that the USS Abraham Lincoln carrier strike group is under continuous surveillance by Iran and will become a target once it enters the range of its missile systems. (Jin Shi)

data.title: AI TRENDS | Takeda's Restructuring Reflects Pharmaceutical Industry's AI Adoption
data.description:
Takeda Pharmaceutical Company is undergoing a significant restructuring as part of a wider trend among major drug manufacturers to integrate artificial intelligence into their operations. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting this strategic move as part of the industry's efforts to enhance efficiency and innovation through AI technologies.

The restructuring aims to streamline Takeda's operations and improve its research and development capabilities by leveraging AI. This shift is indicative of a broader transformation within the pharmaceutical sector, where companies are increasingly adopting AI to accelerate drug discovery and optimize production processes.

Takeda's initiative aligns with the industry's growing recognition of AI's potential to revolutionize healthcare by providing more personalized and effective treatments. As drugmakers continue to explore AI applications, the focus remains on improving patient outcomes and reducing costs.

The integration of AI in pharmaceuticals is expected to drive significant advancements in the coming years, with companies like Takeda leading the charge in this technological evolution.

data.title: Strategy CEO sold 3,299 shares of MSTR stock for $456,000.
data.description: According to the latest Form 144 filing, Strategy CEO Phong Le sold 3,299 restricted shares of MSTR stock at an average price of $138.33 each, for a total value of $456,000. (BitcoinTreasuries.NET)
